reviews.review_description:
For ages as a vr content creator and streamer it was always hard to stream on standalone vr such as meta quest headsets anyway i always wanted a streaming software that could literally stream ANYTHING IN VR and then I found Beamer live and it has changed my life in so many ways i can now stream more than ever.
And even without a pc you can pay for beamxr live pro which is really good for putting text on your stream so overall i love this software and recommend it to everyone and i hope to see it do better in the future. 😁😁😁

developer_response.body: Great to hear your streams are going well! 😊

reviews.review_description: When I press Log in with meta account it’s Makeing me angry 😡 because it says Sign-in (Failed your device clock may Incorrect please check date and time settings and try again) LIKE DUDE ITS NOT WORKING THIS IS THE SCAM BRO ITS NOT FOR LIVE STREAM ITS FOR JUST SCAMMING YOU THIS IS NOT FAKE ITS AWFUL 😣 LIKE BRO IT STOPS QUICKLY IT WAS BUGS GILTCHS ITS NOT FOR LIVE FOR YOUTUBE IT JUST FOR LIVE YOUR VR ITS terrible 😞👺👺👺👺👺👺👺👺👺👺👺👺 it’s BADDDDDDDDD 🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮🤮 It’s have Bad liveing so yeah I have use meta live ststream use computer it’s still goood

I have just started to stream games in 2D on Twitch and thought playing my meta quest games would be a nice touch. I do have a PC (laptop) but when I learned that this app allows you to directly stream from the Headset (no pc required) it caught my attention.. however most things are tied down to a subscription based plan which imo is a little over priced. I'd happily do a one time purchase if that let me stream whenever, the second thing was live chat it doesn't show when I'm playing the game I have to pause my game and load up the Beam app to see any new alerts/messages coming through. Devs please if you read this fix these issues and this 3* will be a 5* with more of a positive review.. has potential is where I'm at with this app ATM!

developer_response.body: Hey! Streaming is completely free and always will be. The chat window can be positioned wherever you like if you enable the seamless multitasking feature in your headset's settings and then simply click back into your game (without pressing the Meta button) you can then keep the chat visible while playing 🙂

reviews.review_description: It's a wondrous app that made streaming easier for us who don't have a PC,ist a small hindrance in games cause it registers buttons in it's general direction as an app switch ,also don't forget to activate multitasking in your quest before using it ,more people who do reviews and tutorials should include that in the first second of their lines/videos

The only real problem I’ve had with this so far is that the stream sometimes goes pixelly but I understand it’ll do that with anything from time to time, this has been a great tool for my YouTube channel and my goal of becoming a full-time content creator and game developer.
This was the most best app to try to stream on, thank you so much, thank you for reading this aswell
It wasn't working at first but i found a way to make it work and i love it sometimes the connection doesn't work but it's still good

reviews.review_title: App is Broken = Stream is in Eligible
reviews.review_description:
Had been so excited for this App = after disappointment that can't just livestream from the Quest 3 standalone was a let down. 
The app worked like 1 or 2 streams. 2nd stream was Ghost Town & it cut my stream off.
Confused me saying youtube was in eligible. 
Then read ya app says its having problems with yt from getting more traffic then expected.  An to stream to TwitchTv, so I created one today & said samething in eligible on Twitch from my room.  Then tried directly in front of the wifi to test even, which I never need doing. 
Haven't a clue, if you could fix the problems it sure would be nice i'm already months behinds schedule VR streaming as planned. 
An would appreciate you looking into this & helping.

developer_response.body:
Many of the stability issues you may have been running into have been recently fixed. We've also made several changes to help with the YouTube errors you were having.
Glad to see your recent streams have been going well! 😊

reviews.review_description: I love this app, it's helpful to use this to stream on Twitch, but the mic system needs a complete overhaul. I want to be able to hear my voice AND have my game audio on stream. And it would be amazing if we had a live chat overlay you could put anywhere, and read them while you're gaming, and I can't stream on YouTube AT ALL, no matter if my account is eligible or not.

reviews.review_title: I’m so happy I found this!
reviews.review_description: After my computer was no longer available for streaming I was able to stream direct to both Twitch & YouTube via this app! After the update you can apply overlays & scenes or connect direct to OBS! Beside early stage fps drop here and there when in 1080p this app is going to do big things!
it works, with your occasiona lag of course and the premium is kinda mid.

I started streaming in liv, I got no one joining me at all and it never worked, good—but I started using this, I got people joining me and me hitting 400 subs! (I got 300 subs in 1 month because of beam!) thanks beam!

developer_response.body: Wow! That's amazing to hear! Hope your future streams go just as well! 🥰

reviews.review_description: Its good but there is way too much stuff that cost money
Its just good
seen bunch of people using it

I enjoy the application; I just tested it out today It works amazingly well but there are some features that should be added in as well;

Like for example it should have its own personal live chat build-in and pop out every time during a game you're playing. if you're a YouTuber/Twitch streamer you can read your live chat & check to see if you received any super chats, donations/memberships notifications anywhere you go including on VRChat and other types of games on your VR headset on both Quest 2 & Quest 3S. 

Including the ability to move the chat box around however you see fit to your liking. 

Another feature would be nice if BeamXR can really cast from the Meta Casting. And give us a choice to upload, send or download our own thumbnails from phone to headset every time before we Go Live on the VR Headset.


But more importantly I would definitely would like to see a new feature that can allow us to plan a schedule if we want to plan on doing a livestream today, tomorrow, or even next month including adding our own description to it as well. 

All I'm saying is it's a great program but it still needs more time to develop & hopefully we can see the updates very soon.
love it so much
it changed my content
When I tried this app and I was live I was Live every single day and something happened BeamXR I got blocked and also YouTube￼
￼ Good
It’s just soooo good

I was initially annoyed about the app not working at the start, but BEAMXR just takes about a day for it to work. I’d recommend it to any of you guys.
To devs: sorry for the other review, didint understand the app that well. It’s really good, keep improving!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the kind words! 😊 Glad you're able to stream!

reviews.review_title: Streams good, but the mic can’t hear me
reviews.review_description: So this is why I give this a four star and not a five star. When I stream with the stream audio option on, the stream itself can hear me. But when I stream with the game audio on, the stream cannot hear me but can hear everything and everyone else. Because like when I stream on VRChat and the stream can hear everyone else but me when I use the game audio option.
This app is wonderful I got so many followers and subscribers in one day

Unreliable software:
Audio Drops Out
Random Stream Drops
Not able to login via a proper URL
App Crashes with random error prompts with not explanation. 

It is has potential, but it's really not worth the bandwidth to learn it just yet. I tried more than a few dozen times. Going back to platforms I understand and work well and have a customer service response teams. 

Will try again if they can ever figure out how to maintain app

reviews.review_title: Such an easy app to to use
reviews.review_description: If you’ve thought about starting stream and want an easy way to get started I can’t recommend this app enough. The interface is easy to use, can connect to popular platforms and with RTMP goes even further using services such as Restream. I literally use this app every day, multiple times a day, and I can’t say enough great things about it. I can’t wait to see what the Dev team has in store for future releases. 10 out of 10 would recommend!

reviews.review_title: Best way theres is to stream standalone
reviews.review_description: Its the best method but that doesnt make it good. You cant call on meta or speak in game while streaming. The quality is bad sometimes and the beamxr logo gets my live flagged for unoriginal content bc so many streamers use it.

This app works fantastic, easy to set up and use but I am disappointed that you can't stream live to YouTube but the devs say they are working on it so I still feel 5, stars is justified for a small team offering a free streaming app. Keep up the good work.
Streaming 10/10 super easy to start, and was super accessible for oculus.
I love the whole design overall, and the things I need to do are so easy I love this app overall.
I don't  need a pc
